Definition: A unique identifier for the multimedia resource (e.g., a URL or file ID for SRP034726.jpg).
Recommended_Standards: String; Globally unique (e.g., URI); ISO 8601 preferred for dates.

Definition: The nature of the media (e.g., 'StillImage' for a photo of a Lepidium barnebyanum specimen).
The file format of the media (e.g., 'image/jpeg' for SRP034726.jpg).
A URL or path to access the media resource (e.g., a link to download SRP034726.jpg).
Recommended_Standards: String; Valid URI; Must be accessible.

Definition: The date the media was created (e.g., when the Lepidium barnebyanum photo was taken).
The individual or entity that created the media (e.g., the photographer).
Recommended_Standards: String; Full names or identifiers (e.g., ORCID); Multiple names with '|'.

Definition: A human-readable title for the media (e.g., 'Lepidium barnebyanum specimen SRP034726').
A description of the media content (e.g., 'Herbarium sheet of Lepidium barnebyanum').
Recommended_Standards: String; Free text, structured notes encouraged.

Definition: The license under which the media is made available (e.g., 'CC BY 4.0').
Recommended_Standards: String; Use standard license identifiers (e.g., 'CC0 1.0', 'CC BY 4.0').

Definition: The person or organization holding rights to the media.
Recommended_Standards: String; Full name or institutional name.
